basic_details.job_title: SDDMASC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 19 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Shri Dada Dev Matri Avum Shishu Chikitsalaya (SDDMASC), Govt. of NCT of Delhi
basic_details.short_information: Govt. of NCT of Delhi is recruiting 19 Senior Residents on ad-hoc basis in various specialties at SDDMASC. Walk-in interview on 23 July 2026. Pay as per 7th CPC Level-11.

important_dates.result_date: Will be displayed on notice board & website

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the following criteria.
qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma/DNB in the concerned specialty from a recognized University. Valid DMC registration (or proof of application).
qualification.experience: Fresh PG candidates preferred. Candidates who completed 3 years SR may also be considered if fresh candidates are not available.

vacancy_details.details: Total 19 Senior Resident posts on ad-hoc basis. Reservation applicable as per rules (SC/ST/OBC Delhi/EWS/PwD). Vacancies may change as per actual availability at the time of interview.

selection_process: Selection is through Walk-in-Interview only. Candidates must bring all original documents along with one set of self-attested copies and the prescribed application form. Final selection is subject to document verification
how_to_apply: Candidates should report at the venue on 23.07.2026 between 9 AM to 11:30 AM for registration. Bring duly filled application form, checklist, 2 passport size photographs, and all required original + self-attested documents. Only eligible candidates fulfilling the residency scheme criteria will be allowed to appear for the interview.
important_instructions: Selected candidates must join within 7 working days. Govt. servants must submit NOC from employer. Undertaking required that candidate is not working elsewhere during tenure. Proper white apron uniform is mandatory. Waiting list valid for 3 months or till next interview. Competent authority reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment.

content_sections.heading: SDDMASC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Shri Dada Dev Matri Avum Shishu Chikitsalaya (SDDMASC), Dabri, New Delhi has issued a walk-in-interview notification (F.2 (14)/751/Rectt/SR/Interview/2026/Vol-X/2026/ 2158 dated 19-07-2026) for filling up 19 Senior Resident posts on ad-hoc basis under the Residency Scheme. Candidates must report for registration between 9:00 AM to 11:30 AM on the interview date. Download SDDMASC Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SDDMASC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Govt. of NCT of Delhi is recruiting 19 Senior Residents on ad-hoc basis in various specialties at SDDMASC. Walk-in interview on 23 July 2026. Pay as per 7th CPC Level-11.

rows.shri_dada_dev_matri_avum_shishu_chikitsa: Obs & Gynae (07), Paediatrics (04), Anaesthesia (03), Radiology (02), Medicine (03)
Initially 44 days (extendable up to 01 year or till regular appointment, whichever earlier)
Room No. 201, 2nd Floor, Administrative Block, SDDMASC

content_sections.heading: SDDMASC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.date: Will be displayed on notice board & website

content_sections.heading: SDDMASC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Total 19 Senior Resident posts on ad-hoc basis. Reservation applicable as per rules (SC/ST/OBC Delhi/EWS/PwD). Vacancies may change as per actual availability at the time of interview.

content_sections.heading: SDDMASC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill the following criteria.

rows.details: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma/DNB in the concerned specialty from a recognized University. Valid DMC registration (or proof of application).

rows.criteria: Age Limit (as on date of interview)
rows.details: Maximum 45 years (relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 5 years extra for PwD)
Fresh PG candidates preferred. Candidates who completed 3 years SR may also be considered if fresh candidates are not available.
Must not have completed 3 years of Senior Residency earlier (except under relaxation clause).

content_sections.heading: SDDMASC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is through Walk-in-Interview only. Candidates must bring all original documents along with one set of self-attested copies and the prescribed application form. Final selection is subject to document verification, medical fitness, and approval of competent authority.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SDDMASC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates should report at the venue on 23.07.2026 between 9 AM to 11:30 AM for registration. Bring duly filled application form, checklist, 2 passport size photographs, and all required original + self-attested documents. Only eligible candidates fulfilling the residency scheme criteria will be allowed to appear for the interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for SDDMASC Senior Resident Candidates
content_sections.text: Selected candidates must join within 7 working days. Govt. servants must submit NOC from employer. Undertaking required that candidate is not working elsewhere during tenure. Proper white apron uniform is mandatory. Waiting list valid for 3 months or till next interview. Competent authority reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment.

content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in-interview date for SDDMASC Senior Resident 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in-interview is scheduled on 23 July 2026 (Thursday).

faq.question: Q2. How many Senior Resident vacancies are there at Shri Dada Dev Hospital?
faq.answer: Total 19 vacancies across Obs & Gynae, Paediatrics, Anaesthesia, Radiology, and Medicine.

faq.question: Q3. What is the pay scale for Senior Resident at SDDMASC?
faq.answer: Pay as per 7th CPC Level-11 (Rs. 67,700 – 2,08,700) plus usual allowances.

faq.question: Q4. What documents are required for SDDMASC Senior Resident walk-in?
faq.answer: Application form, 10th certificate, MBBS/PG certificates, DMC registration, caste certificate, Aadhaar, etc. (full checklist provided in notification).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Delhi Govt Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Senior Resident posts at SDDMASC?
faq.answer: Maximum 45 years as on date of interview (with relaxations for reserved categories and PwD).

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates who completed 3 years SR apply for SDDMASC ad-hoc posts?
faq.answer: Yes, they can apply if fresh PG candidates are not available. Separate merit list will be prepared.

faq.question: Q8. What is the tenure of Senior Resident appointment?
faq.answer: Initially 44 days, extendable up to maximum 3 years total tenure (including previous service).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job at SDDMASC?
faq.answer: No, these are ad-hoc appointments. Regular recruitment is done through Centralized Committee.

faq.question: Q10. Where to report for SDDMASC Senior Resident interview?
faq.answer: Room No. 201, 2nd Floor, Administrative Block, Shri Dada Dev Matri Avum Shishu Chikitsalaya, Dabri, New Delhi-45.
